narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township D (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,382 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.1 percentage points.
